description: You are a civil engineer designing a trapezoidal open drainage channel cross-section in SolveSpace. Create a fully-constrained symmetric trapezoid profile (closed quadrilateral) with a 40 mm horizontal bottom edge, a 70 mm horizontal top edge, and a 25 mm vertical height between them. The profile must be symmetric with equal-length side edges and all corners connected. Save the fully-constrained sketch to ~/Documents/SolveSpace/channel_profile.slvs.
